summary: Completed comprehensive E2E testing of GetLocal V2 Candidate KYC Feature. All backend APIs and frontend UI elements working correctly. 4 phases validated: 1) Expanded candidate schema with education_level, english_level, experience_type, id_document_url, verification_status 2) Manual form on /join with new KYC dropdowns + ID upload 3) Filter bar on /hire with Education/English/Experience dropdowns + Verified Only toggle + Verified Identity badge 4) Unified /admin/kyc dashboard with Candidates/Employers toggle.
passed_tests: GET /nextapi/candidates?education=12th+Pass - Filter by education_level works
GET /nextapi/candidates?english=Basic+English - Filter by english_level works
GET /nextapi/candidates?experience=Experienced - Filter by experience_type works
GET /nextapi/candidates?verified=true - Filter verified only works
GET /nextapi/candidates - Unfiltered returns all candidates
GET /nextapi/candidates?education=All - 'All' value correctly ignored
GET /nextapi/candidates with combined filters works
POST /nextapi/upload-audio - Manual entry saves education_level, english_level, experience_type
POST /nextapi/candidates/upload-id - Upload ID sets verification_status to Pending
POST /nextapi/candidates/upload-id - Requires candidate_id (400 on missing)
POST /nextapi/candidates/upload-id - Requires document file (400 on missing)
PATCH /nextapi/candidates - Admin approve sets Verified
PATCH /nextapi/candidates - Admin reject sets Unverified
PATCH /nextapi/candidates - Requires candidate_id (400)
PATCH /nextapi/candidates - Requires valid action approve/reject (400)
Test candidate ad1c43f5-991e-407f-ac94-a7141c5bd672 exists with all expected KYC fields
/join page - Mode toggle (Voice/Manual) exists and works
/join page - Manual form has Education, English dropdowns
/join page - Manual form has Experience type buttons (Fresher/Experienced)
/join page - Boost Your Profile ID upload section visible
/join page - All form fields fillable and selectable
/hire page - Education filter dropdown exists and triggers API calls
/hire page - English filter dropdown exists and triggers API calls
/hire page - Experience filter dropdown exists and triggers API calls
/hire page - Verified Only toggle exists and triggers API calls
/hire page - Verified Identity badge visible on verified candidate cards
/hire page - Candidate cards show education/english/experience tags
/admin/kyc page - KYC Verification title and description render
/admin/kyc page - Candidates tab toggle exists
/admin/kyc page - Employers tab toggle exists
/admin/kyc page - Tab switching works correctly
/admin/kyc page - Filter buttons (Pending/Verified/Unverified/All) work
/admin/kyc page - Candidate cards show name, status, KYC fields
/admin/kyc page - View ID Document link exists for candidates
/admin/kyc page - Approve/Reject buttons work for pending candidates
/admin/kyc page - Employer cards show company name and document link
/jobs page - Renders correctly (no regressions)
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test candidates with KYC fields during pytest execution: TEST_KYC_Manual_Entry (Graduate, Good English, Experienced), TEST_ID_Upload_Candidate (Diploma, Basic English, Fresher), TEST_Admin_Approve_Candidate, TEST_Admin_Reject_Candidate. Pre-existing verified candidate ad1c43f5-991e-407f-ac94-a7141c5bd672 (12th Pass, Basic English, Experienced, Verified).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Candidate KYC V3 features all working. Backend tests at /app/getlocal/tests/test_candidate_kyc_v3.py. Key endpoints tested: GET /nextapi/candidates (with filter params), POST /nextapi/candidates/upload-id, PATCH /nextapi/candidates. The /join manual form has education_level, english_level, experience_type dropdowns plus ID upload. The /hire page has filter dropdowns and Verified Identity badge. The /admin/kyc page now has both Candidates and Employers tabs. ID documents stored in /app/getlocal/public/id-docs/.
